headline: Math-hygiene cluster extends to ai-labs index. India-Pakistan anniversary confirms structural entrenchment. Zero band changes. Zero floor designations. Myanmar hospital-targeting conduct documented.
lead: Tonight's cycle is confirmation-heavy by design: anniversary re-confirms for India and Pakistan, seven first-agent baselines across two indexes and five rotation backfill countries, and a floor entity conduct documentation for Myanmar. The most consequential finding is not a score change — it is Aleph Alpha's first-agent baseline producing a +8.0 reconstruction discrepancy identical in magnitude to the Apptronik and 1X Technologies pattern confirmed as a structural robotics-labs formula error on May 7. The +8.0 pattern now appears in the ai-labs index, raising the question of whether the formula error is cross-index. The math-hygiene cluster grows to 13 entities; the data-team audit scope must now include both robotics-labs and ai-labs composite-derivation formulas.

confirmations.headline: India — anniversary re-confirm. Indus Waters Treaty abeyance formally reaffirmed as conditional sustained policy instrument (not temporary). HRW World Report 2026 documents 8,000+ X account blocking under executive order, post-conflict media crackdown, anti-Muslim hate-speech surge. Composite 34.4 / Developing sustained. INT and EQU remain at band floor. All dimensions unchanged.
confirmations.triggerContext: One-year anniversary of Operation Sindoor (May 7 2025). IWT suspension affecting ~240M downstream Pakistani livelihoods declared formally sustained. In-window sources: The Statesman IWT abeyance reaffirmation; HRW World Report 2026 India chapter; Arab News hydro-terrorism framing.
watchItems: Supreme Court civil-liberties trajectory under anti-terror framing

confirmations.headline: Pakistan — anniversary re-confirm. BOUNDARY WATCH MAINTAINED. Canonical composite 20.3 (0.3 above Critical floor at 20). Genocide Watch May 2026 Country Report: Stage 6 (Polarization), elements of Stage 9 (Persecution) — femicide (~405 cases 2024), reproductive autonomy denied (2 in 3 women per UN 2025), blasphemy-law persecution. Multilateral positive offset: Pakistan formally approached UNSC urging IWT restoration. Low confidence. Rotation-state data-integrity flag: rotation-state.json shows 15.3 vs canonical 20.3 — sync action required.
confirmations.triggerContext: One-year anniversary of Operation Sindoor. Genocide Watch Pakistan Country Report May 2026 (in-window primary-source structural designation). Pakistan UNSC engagement on IWT. Military strong-response warning.
watchItems: UN Security Council response to Pakistan IWT approach

confirmations.headline: Meta Platforms — FIRST AGENT BASELINE. Scanner null-classification corrected to canonical 10.9 / Critical (fortune-500.json rank 445). Phase 2 New Mexico bench trial active in window: court-ordered child safety reforms sought after Phase 1 $375M verdict (75,000 violations of NM Unfair Practices Act; knowing harm to children's mental health). Meta threatened to remove platforms from New Mexico rather than comply — withdrawal-threat-rather-than-comply posture registered as structural INT signal. NM AG: Meta's stance 'is showing the world how little it cares about child safety.' Critical-band confirmed. Phase 2 ruling (expected late May / early June) is next material event: if Meta refuses court-ordered reforms, floor-candidacy review triggered.
confirmations.triggerContext: Phase 2 bench trial opened May 4 2026 in New Mexico. Phase 1 $375M verdict March 2026. Meta withdrawal threat late April 2026. NM AG statement April 30 2026.
watchItems: If Meta refuses court-ordered reforms: floor-candidacy review
EU DSA enforcement on Instagram algorithm and minor-safety
Parallel state AG enforcement following NM model

confirmations.headline: Palau — FIRST AGENT BASELINE. Rotation backfill. Composite 53.1 / Functional confirmed. March 2024 COFA renewal ($889M / 20-year package; climate, healthcare, education, infrastructure allocations). Marine sanctuary among world's largest. Pacific climate-leadership posture; aligned with Vanuatu UN climate-accountability resolution. US high-frequency radar system (June 2026 completion) introduces sovereignty trade-off — registered as mixed BND/INT signal. Reconstructs cleanly.

Bhutan — FIRST AGENT BASELINE. Rotation backfill. Composite 51.6 / Functional confirmed. GNH constitutional framework; carbon-negative economy; universal healthcare; free education. Counter-weight: 2024 UN experts call for release of 32 prisoners detained decades under broad terrorism laws; ~10,000 Lhotshampa in Nepalese UNHCR camps; restricted citizenship categories. April 2026 South Asia coverage flags prisoners of conscience. Positive welfare architecture offset by structural minority-rights deficit. Reconstructs cleanly.
watchItems: Progress on UN-flagged political prisoner release

confirmations.headline: Monaco — FIRST AGENT BASELINE. Rotation backfill. Composite 51.6 / Functional confirmed. BND 4.0 (micro-state rule-of-law boundary clarity); EQU 2.5 (non-citizen-majority population, no domestic asylum process). March 2026 GRECO cited improvements in legislative transparency but persistent gaps on parliamentarian financial-interest disclosure and judicial-appointment transparency. July 2024 asset-disclosure regime and independent ethics committee established. UN CERD 118th-session follow-up active in window. Lèse-majesté statutory exception (up to 5 years for prince-criticism) is sub-threshold INT concern. Reconstructs cleanly.

Namibia — FIRST AGENT BASELINE. Rotation backfill. Composite 50.0 / Functional confirmed. Netumbo Nandi-Ndaitwah elected first female President 2024. April-May 2026 (in-window): President publicly optimistic that Namibia-Germany genocide reparations final agreement can be reached by end of 2026; chiefs' forum and technical task force review nearing conclusion. Counter-weight: very high Gini coefficient; post-apartheid land-ownership asymmetry; Herero/Nama civil society contests prior joint-declaration participation exclusion. Inaugural Genocide Remembrance Day institutionalised May 28 2025. Reconstructs cleanly.
watchItems: Namibia-Germany reparations final agreement (target end-2026) — material INT/SYS positive if reached
Herero/Nama civil society response to final agreement
Accelerate re-queue to 60 days if final agreement reached; otherwise standard 120 days (2026-09-05)

confirmations.headline: Samoa — FIRST AGENT BASELINE. Rotation backfill. Composite 50.0 / Functional confirmed. Fiame Naomi Mata'afa first female PM elected 2021; post-constitutional-crisis governance stabilised. CHOGM 2024 host. 100% renewable electrification by 2030 commitment. Pacific COP 2026 solidarity. Counter-weight: women's parliamentary representation 6 of 52 seats; matai (chiefly) governance gender-asymmetry legacy; climate-displacement existential risk. Reconstructs cleanly.

floorEntities.headline: Myanmar — FLOOR CONDUCT DOCUMENTATION. No score change. May 7 2026 Winmana village hospital airstrike (Kani Township, Sagaing Region): two PDF members receiving medical treatment killed. Patients targeted under medical care — direct IHL violation (Geneva Conventions Art. 18, AP I Art. 12). Near-daily airstrike pattern in window: May 6 Tedim Township (9 killed including 5 women), May 2 Kanpetlet (9 civilians including children). Amnesty International December 2025 established hospital-targeting as documented pattern category. Fortify Rights November 2025 documented systematic destruction of medical facilities. UN SR Tom Andrews April 2026: 127x airstrike escalation 2021-2025. Hospital-targeting pattern appended to floor-exit-criteria record. Floor cluster: 8 entities, no change this cycle.
conductCategories: May 7 2026 hospital airstrike (Winmana village, Kani Township, Sagaing) — patients targeted under medical care
May 2-7 near-daily airstrike cluster across Sagaing and Chin State — systematic civilian and medical-facility targeting
Hospital-targeting pattern category formally appended to floor-exit-criteria record
floorEntities.floorExitCriteriaStatus: No trajectory toward exit. Required: cessation of attacks + restoration of humanitarian access + leadership accountability mechanism. Hospital-targeting pattern moves entity further from exit criteria.

mathHygiene.crossIndexNote: The +8.0 pattern previously confirmed as a structural robotics-labs formula error (Apptronik, 1X Technologies — May 7) now appears in the ai-labs index at identical magnitude. The formula error may be cross-index. Data-team audit scope must include both robotics-labs and ai-labs composite-derivation formulas. No composites at the Established/Exemplary boundary in either index should be published or revised until audit is complete.
mathHygiene.auditAction: Data-team bulk audit of robotics-labs AND ai-labs composite-derivation formulas — URGENT. No boundary-zone composites to be published until resolved.

signals.signal: Peter Magyar sworn in as Prime Minister — mandatory positive band-change assessment. Pre-staged dossier ready. First confirmed positive band-change opportunity in EU countries cluster in several cycles.
signals.actionRequired: Assess as first-queue item on May 9 scan.

signals.signal: Three-day trilateral ceasefire (May 9-11) — first day of conduct window. Trump-brokered; dual presidential confirmation from Zelenskyy and Kremlin aide Ushakov. 1,000-prisoner swap included. First agreed trilateral ceasefire after collapse of all prior unilateral attempts. May 9 conduct is the scoring evidence.
signals.actionRequired: Assess Ukraine on May 9 scan after first 24h of ceasefire conduct observation.

signals.signal: Phase 1 safeguard inventory delivery to Pentagon — first hold-expiry trigger. White House discussions on carve-out ongoing. DC Circuit oral arguments May 19 as second trigger.
signals.actionRequired: Assess on or after May 15 depending on inventory delivery outcome.

signals.signal: DC Circuit oral arguments in Pentagon AI supply-chain dispute. Second hold-expiry trigger if May 15 assessment not yet completed.
signals.actionRequired: Carry if not assessed on May 15.

signals.signal: Musk v. Altman advisory verdict (estimated). Breach of charitable trust finding would be an ACC/SYS event. Hold active through verdict.

30-day re-evaluation: federal military response to TPLF reconstitution of pre-war Tigray regional council. Floor candidacy retained. Federal military response or large-scale civilian harm event triggers floor designation.
signals.actionRequired: Re-queue June 5. Monitor daily for catastrophic-trigger events before then.

signals.signal: Phase 2 New Mexico bench trial ruling window (three weeks from May 4 open). If court-ordered reforms issued and Meta refuses compliance: floor-candidacy review triggered. If Meta complies: sub-threshold positive trajectory signal.
signals.actionRequired: Assess on ruling day. Flag immediately if withdrawal from New Mexico executed.

holds.holdReason: Pentagon AI dispute ongoing — DC Circuit oral arguments May 19; White House reopened discussions but no structural carve-out announced. Phase 1 safeguard inventory delivery May 15 is next material event.
Musk v. Altman trial week 2 underway; no advisory verdict in May 8 window. Hold expires on verdict, estimated May 21.
Nadella testimony in Musk v. Altman trial beginning May 11. Pentagon classified AI cohort context live.
Magyar swearing-in confirmed May 9 — hold expires May 9. Positive band-change candidate. Pre-staged dossier ready. MANDATORY first-queue item for May 9 scan.
Last assessed May 4. No new material evidence in May 8 window. Standard rotation interval applies.
